alkylation reagent: the reaction solution containing sodium deoxycholate (SDC), tris (2-carboxyethyl) phosphine (TCEP), and chloroacetamide (CAA) was added to the magnetic beads for one-step reduction, alkylation, and elution.
cleavage agent: added into trypsin for enzymatic hydrolysis overnight.
instrument: mass spectrometry was performed using an Orbitrap Exploris 480 liquid chromatography-mass spectrometry (LC-MS) system.
reduction reagent: the reaction solution containing sodium deoxycholate (SDC), tris (2-carboxyethyl) phosphine (TCEP), and chloroacetamide (CAA).
